title: Number Guessing Game | C++ Example
description: How to create a number guessing game in C++ where the user tries to guess a number between 1-100 and is told to guess higher or lower until they guess correctly.  Source code: https://github.com/portfoliocourses/cplusplus-example-code/blob/main/number_guessing_game.cpp.  Check out https://www.portfoliocourses.com to build a portfolio that will impress employers!
